# zenpredict public API — additions from non-default features
# features: advanced,std
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.

## summary
#
#   pub modules                                 1
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)        12
#   free functions                             19
#   inherent methods                           23
#   struct fields                              23
#   enum variants                              14

#   auto-trait-complete types                   7
#
# per-module pub lines:
#   (root)                           72

## items (81 lines)

pub CellHint::expected_rescue_rate: u8
pub CellHint::flags: u8
pub CellHint::p99_shortfall_pp: u8
pub CellHint::suggested_strategy: u8
pub fn CellHint::is_dead(&self) -> bool
pub fn CellHint::is_degenerate(&self) -> bool
pub fn CellHint::is_high_variance(&self) -> bool
pub fn CellHint::strategy(&self) -> core::option::Option<rescue::RescueStrategy>

pub type OutputBound = FeatureBound

## trait impls (7 types)

## auto traits

7 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
